    "R1.2": "The paragraph makes a specific, verifiable directional claim about the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound: that (1/κ)(1−e^(−κ)) 'tightens' as κ increases. This claim is logically inverted — the expression is monotonically decreasing in κ on (0,1], approaching 1 at κ→0 and (1−1/e) at κ=1 — making logical consistency load-bearing if technical scrutiny is intended.",
    "R1.3": "The empirical results (CurvMax ratio 0.66 vs. baseline 0.83) directly contradict the theoretical narrative the authors claim they support; the paper characterizes this contradiction as 'broadly consistent,' which it is not. Evidence-claim alignment is therefore load-bearing under any technical reading of the delegation.",
    "R1.6": "'Take a look at this paragraph' is a conventional writing-feedback idiom and could mean the delegation is exclusively a prose-polish request, making R1.6 fully load-bearing under that interpretation."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I focus on technical and logical scrutiny of the mathematical claims and empirical consistency, or on writing quality and prose polish?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph makes a specific, verifiable directional claim about the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound: that (1/κ)(1−e^(−κ)) 'tightens' as κ increases. This claim is logically inverted — the expression is monotonically decreasing in κ on (0,1], approaching 1 at κ→0 and (1−1/e) at κ=1 — making logical consistency load-bearing if technical scrutiny is intended.
rationale.R1.3: The empirical results (CurvMax ratio 0.66 vs. baseline 0.83) directly contradict the theoretical narrative the authors claim they support; the paper characterizes this contradiction as 'broadly consistent,' which it is not. Evidence-claim alignment is therefore load-bearing under any technical reading of the delegation.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look at this paragraph' is a conventional writing-feedback idiom and could mean the delegation is exclusively a prose-polish request, making R1.6 fully load-bearing under that interpretation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on technical and logical scrutiny of the mathematical claims and empirical consistency, or on writing quality and prose polish?
